narrative:
Goshen Twp township has 10,767 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
